# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Native resource leak fix**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 fixes a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData with a subset rectangle.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — A native resource leak that occurred when calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) is now correctly disposed. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
